mapper.insert: insert into t_production_task ( task_no, order_id, order_number, task_status, planned_quantity, create_mode, assignee_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{taskNo}, #{orderId}, #{orderNumber}, #{taskStatus}, #{plannedQuantity}, #{createMode}, #{assigneeId}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: select task_id, task_no, order_id, order_number, task_status, planned_quantity, create_mode, assignee_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from t_production_task where order_id = #{orderId} order by task_id desc

select task_id, task_no, order_id, order_number, task_status, planned_quantity, create_mode, assignee_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from t_production_task where order_id = #{orderId} order by task_id desc limit 1
